title: Obsidian for Occulto
description:
The official mod for the Minecraft Server, Occulto, as used in the Occulto Mod-Set.

Feel free to incorporate this mod into other modpacks for Occulto (must link to here).
body:
![Occulto Obsidian Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5c9c0c37cec711552b82fc10af366110682aca1_0.webp)

This is the official mod for **Occulto**, this mod was created and designed for use on the **Occulto** Minecraft server, it provides multiple useful features that can be used *exclusively* on **Occulto**, and will not work elsewhere.

**Dependencies:**
-
- [Minecraft](https://minecraft.net) 1.20.4
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

**Installation:**
-

1. Download the latest version of the Fabric Loader from [FabricMC.net](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/).
2. Download the latest mod JAR file from the release page.
3. Dowload [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) and [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu).
4. Place the all the mods' JAR files into the "mods" folder which is inside your Minecraft installation directory (usually %appdata%/.minecraft)
5. Launch the Minecraft Launcher with the Fabric profile.

**Features:**
-
- Player Profile Viewer (party inviter, trade, ect..)
- Inventory Full Warning
- Join Occulto from Main Menu
- Custom Main Menu
- Lock Hotbar Slots

**Support & Issues:**
-
If you come across an issue with the mod, please join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/UFGqZKw3tn) and open a ticket.

**Common Issues:**
- Wrong Fabric/Minecraft Version (please check versions page to check what minecraft version you need)
- Not using the mod on the Occulto Minecraft Server (IP: play.occulto.quest)
- Missing Dependencies [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) & [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu).
